# ISwr.MutateAsync method

Executes a mutation action and invalidates the specified cache keys. If the mutation throws, no cache keys are evicted.

```csharp
public Task MutateAsync(Func<Task> mutation, params string[] invalidateKeys)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| mutation | The async action to execute (e.g., a POST/PUT/DELETE call). |
| invalidateKeys | Cache keys to evict after the mutation completes successfully. |
